reason: Current meta description is generic and duplicated in the footer; a more specific description improves CTR for key search terms like 'lip blushing Gold Coast'.
The FAQ states free shipping over $100 but the site-wide announcement bar on every page says 'Free Shipping Over $80' — this corrects the FAQ to match the banner.
The hero CTA links to a single product category (skin) rather than the full shop landing page, which better matches the broad 'Shop Nude by Crystal' label.
